# Project Profile (auto-generated by /omp-init)
Backend:   FastAPI (Python >=3.11; local interpreter 3.12) / SQLAlchemy 2.x ORM over SQLite (data/ DB on the NAS)
Frontend:  Vue 3 (Composition API, `<script setup>`) + Vite build tool
Tests:     backend/tests/ (pytest, asyncio_mode=auto, mock-based units) / frontend/src/utils/*.test.js (Vitest)
Fast:      cd backend && pytest -q
Full:      cd backend && pytest
Conventions:
  - Media type: app uses "show" internally, converts to "tv" for TMDB API calls.
  - Additive DB migrations ONLY: any new column on an existing model MUST get a guarded, idempotent ALTER in init_db()'s _migrate_watchlist_columns() (create_all never adds columns) — else the live SQLite DB 500s "no such column" (the v2.4.1 incident).
  - Radarr/Sonarr clients extend BaseArrClient (shared persistent httpx client); client factories defined once per module router and imported by the library router.
  - Backend: type hints on every function, async/await for I/O, Pydantic schemas, raise HTTPException for errors; TMDBClient._get_or_none() returns None on 404 for detail endpoints.
  - Frontend: Composition API with `<script setup>`; service layer auto-unwraps response.data.
  - `.env` MUST live in the project ROOT (not backend/); secrets (API keys) encrypted in Settings, rest plain.
Source:    code
